findings.one_line: The new all-l vertex-deficit theorem is plausibly distinct from the Boushehrian et al. lower-bound family, but the note does not give a theorem-level non-subsumption comparison with Song et al.'s categorical-IV characterization (or the closest multi-valued-IV extensions cited by Boushehrian et al.); qualify the claimed unresolved projection-enumeration gap and state exactly why those results do not yield these vertex-deficit certificates, so the required novelty floor can be assessed.
